meta.summary: Ensembl Variant Effect Predictor (VEP) 116.0 runtime for annotating sequence variants and running related VEP helper tools.
meta.description: Ensembl Variant Effect Predictor (VEP) 116.0 runtime for annotating sequence variants and running related VEP helper tools.

test: vep --help 2>&1 | grep -F "ensembl-vep          : 116.0" >/dev/null && vep --help 2>&1 | grep -F "ENSEMBL VARIANT EFFECT PREDICTOR" >/dev/null && haplo --help 2>&1 | grep -F "HAPLOSAURUS" >/dev/null && variant_recoder --help 2>&1 | grep -F "VARIANT RECODER" >/dev/null

INSTALL.pl --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- "--CACHE_VERSION    Set data" >/dev/null && INSTALL.pl --help 2>&1 | grep -F "default = 116" >/dev/null && filter_vep --help 2>&1 | grep -F "consequence data" >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-vep-filter-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/taffish/share/vep/smoke/filter-input.vcf "$tmp/filter-input.vcf"; filter_vep --format vcf --filter "Consequence is missense_variant" -i "$tmp/filter-input.vcf" -o "$tmp/out.vcf" --force_overwrite; grep -F "missense_variant" "$tmp/out.vcf" >/dev/null; if grep -F "synonymous_variant" "$tmp/out.vcf"; then exit 1; fi; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-vep-gff-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/taffish/share/vep/smoke/ref.fa /opt/taffish/share/vep/smoke/genes.gff3.gz /opt/taffish/share/vep/smoke/genes.gff3.gz.tbi /opt/taffish/share/vep/smoke/input.vcf "$tmp"/; vep --gff "$tmp/genes.gff3.gz" --fasta "$tmp/ref.fa" --format vcf --vcf --force_overwrite --no_stats --species homo_sapiens -i "$tmp/input.vcf" -o "$tmp/out.vcf" > "$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; grep -F "##VEP=\"v116.0\"" "$tmp/out.vcf" >/dev/null && grep -F "missense_variant" "$tmp/out.vcf" >/dev/null && grep -F "GENE1" "$tmp/out.vcf" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Ensembl Variant Effect Predictor (VEP)
upstream.citation: McLaren W, Gil L, Hunt SE, Riat HS, Ritchie GRS, Thormann A, Flicek P, Cunningham F. The Ensembl Variant Effect Predictor. Genome Biology. 2016;17:122.
